page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Sensitive and accurate identification of LTR retrotransposons
page_metadata.biotools__summary: LTR_retriever is a highly accurate and sensitive program for identification of LTR retrotransposons; The LTR Assembly Index (LAI) is also included in this package.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: LTR_retriever is a highly accurate and sensitive program for identification of LTR retrotransposons; The LTR Assembly Index (LAI) is also included in this package.
